title: selaginella gypsophila
intro: Selaginella gypsophila, also known as Desert Fern or Gypsophila, is a type of epiphytic, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Selaginella gypsophila include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Selaginella gypsophila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
